name: fasten-share-desktop
description: Fasten Share desktop shell (Electron). Runs the Next.js client as an embedded Node server and packages it.
author: Fasten Share <fastenshare@qq.com>

scripts.dev: npm run build && wait-on tcp:8086 && cross-env DEV_URL=http://localhost:8086 electron .
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm run rebuild:native && electron-builder --mac dmg zip
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run rebuild:native && electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && npm run rebuild:native && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb
